title: Aquifer
description: A small  mod that ads an uncraftable bow that stores arrows, and when you are hit by an arrow, it negates water breathing, respiration and depthstrider
body:
A small mod made for the now closed "Flower SMP"
It adds a new effect "Suffication" which disables Water Breathing, Conduit power, Respiration, and Depth strider.
New Creative item: Dragon's eye
Shoots a custom arrow that has huge drag while not in water or rain, inflicts suffication.
new Hud: Having Conduit power (or my uuid) gives you a custom coral hud overlay
